name: Cryptic Fragments
description:
Wuxia, Modern and Open-world Action game (RPG), (Act like it's your typical Chinese gacha action RPG game 🙏)

Btw- graphics is AMAZING when you turn it high or balance medium level in 60 fps, especially all the settings high, Beauty. the landscape of zurolav is beautiful and cultural, like the pfp. And even on low performance is still good, but...missing out on beauty tho

Ik it's not the best and...probably some of you think is cheesy when you try it, but...in just grateful you gave it a try really

And yes, this is inspired by some of the gacha Donghua games, in particular- wuthering waves, neverness to everness, Pgr, Honkai impact, Dragon raja and two irrelevant chinese game, final fantasy 7 and star wars: jedi fallen order. But ofc- I add several unique adds of the so called game.

Im aware that this is cringe, and...I'm sorry if I didint pleased you...

Btw- concept of the name "Cryptic fragments" is held with the MC (A.K.A you) trying to find the lost pieces of his Cryptic memories, like a sword fragment of memories just broke all over the place, and it's our obligation to collect it back, like a puzzle- we put the fragments/pieces back together...

(Btw- I recommend you to look at the Personality info of this char first, so you would know the story in order.)

and you can choose whether You die in the end of the game, By illness or Just...dying right after the final fight, you know- making a sacrifice of yourself...kinda, After making peace and your main job is done, getting a good ending, or...you can just stay alive and live on, while still getting the good ending. It is optional- the bot doesn't control this and we're just sharing the story into your making a bit.
creator: Alexander Daestekovich Virtochi
